title: agrostis alpina var. flavescens
intro: Agrostis alpina var. flavescens, also known as yellow bent, is a type of flowering grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Agrostis alpina var. flavescens can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
